text: The study was conducted in three hospitals across São Paulo, Brazil, between January and December 2017. Patient recruitment followed standard protocols approved by the local ethics committee.
Samples were collected from the Yangtze River Delta region in eastern China, specifically from monitoring stations near Shanghai and Nanjing.
The earthquake epicenter was located 15 km southwest of Kathmandu, Nepal, at a depth of 12 km. Aftershocks were felt as far as New Delhi, India.
Our field survey covered the boreal forests of northern Finland, with sampling sites distributed across Lapland from Rovaniemi to Utsjoki.
The disease outbreak was first reported in Wuhan, Hubei Province, and subsequently spread to other provinces including Guangdong and Zhejiang.
Archaeological excavations at the site near Lake Turkana in the Rift Valley of Kenya revealed artifacts dating to the early Pleistocene.
Climate data were obtained from weather stations in the Rocky Mountains, spanning from northern Montana to southern Colorado along the Continental Divide.
The clinical trial enrolled participants from hospitals in London, Birmingham, and Manchester, with the coordinating center based at University College London.
Marine biodiversity surveys were conducted along the Great Barrier Reef off the coast of Queensland, Australia, during the austral summer of 2018.
Volcanic ash deposits from the eruption of Mount Pinatubo in the Philippines were analyzed at laboratories in Tokyo, Japan, and Menlo Park, California.
